name: Evidence-Fidelity-Score (EFS)
description: Measures the cryptographic and logical alignment between 'Agent-Claims' and 'Source-Telemetry' (Raw-Logs, Blockchains, or API-Receipts).
goalMapping: Eliminates 'Narrative-Drift' and ensures all 'Executive-Decisions' are based on 'Telemetry-Proven' reality.

thresholds.warning: 99.5% - 99.9% (Triggers 'Deep-Trace' on the claiming agent via Eva/Compliance)
